title: Reliance
doc_html:
PART III. MISCELLANEOUS PROVISIONS

§4261.301. Reliance

            A supported decisionmaking agreement that complies with Part II of this Chapter is presumed valid. A party may rely on the presumption of validity unless the party has actual knowledge that the supported decisionmaking agreement was not validly executed.

            Acts 2020, No. 258, §2.
doc_text:
PART III.  MISCELLANEOUS PROVISIONS
§4261.301.  Reliance
A supported decisionmaking agreement that complies with Part II of this Chapter is
presumed valid.  A party may rely on the presumption of validity unless the party has actual
knowledge that the supported decisionmaking agreement was not validly executed.
Acts 2020, No. 258, §2.
